response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong individual contributor with 20 years of broad development experience and relevant exposure to developer tooling (CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks, MCP generators), but this role is fundamentally a people management position. There is no evidence anywhere in the resume of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, running hiring loops, or owning a team roadmap at organizational scope. Staff-level IC roles do not substitute for the 2+ years of people management the role explicitly requires, and the absence of any organizational leadership experience makes him a poor fit for this specific position regardless of his technical depth.
strengths: 20+ years of software development across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrating exceptional technical breadth
Hands-on developer tooling experience including CI/CD setup, open-source test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators
Track record of knowledge sharing through workshops, conference talks, and community contributions aligned with the productivity-focused mission
concerns: Zero evidence of people management: no direct reports, no mention of 1:1s, performance feedback, hiring, or team development at any point in the career history
No organizational leadership or strategic roadmap ownership — staff IC roles at re:cinq and Altom involved technical contribution, not setting team priorities or driving cross-team alignment
Currently in a career gap since October 2025 with no indication of management trajectory or intent in recent or upcoming roles
